svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Codex" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="fase3-final-sin-br" name="Fase 3 Final"> <mxGraphModel dx="1719" dy="904" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="950" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;fontStyle=1;" value="FASE 3 - Propuesta de robustez y escalabilidad" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="660" x="360" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="front" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Front-End React" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="70" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Load Balancer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="300" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;fontStyle=1;" value="API Gateway xN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="530" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Redis / ElastiCache - cache TTL corto" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="800" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Query Service xN - CQRS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="230" x="1220" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="broker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=3;spacing=10;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="RabbitMQ Cluster - Command Bus + Event Bus" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="460" x="430" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="saga" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Saga Orchestrator - compensaciones" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="1030" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dlq" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="DLQ - eventos fallidos" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="1060" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="svcGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Microservicios escalables xN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="1010" x="50" y="475" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="auth" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Auth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="125" x="60" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Core - turnos / canchas / pagos" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="220" x="210" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="match" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Matchmaking - partidos incompletos" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="57.5" width="240" x="450" y="571.25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ventas" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Ventas" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="145" x="720" y="572.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="torneos" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;spacing=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Torneos" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="145" x="900" y="571.25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="primary" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3d;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="PostgreSQL Primary - escrituras" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="250" x="430" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="replicas" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3d;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" value="Read Replicas - lecturas pesadas" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="250" x="1210" y="707.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ops" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fontSize=13;strokeWidth=1;spacing=8;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;" value="Operación transversal: Auto Scaling + Health Checks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="65" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fontSize=13;strokeWidth=1;spacing=8;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;" value="Redis cachea lecturas frecuentes. Read Replicas separan lectura/escritura. <br>Saga + DLQ manejan fallos. <br>Auto Scaling y Health Checks son transversales." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="310" x="30" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="front" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" target="lb" value="HTTP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="lb" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" target="gw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="gw" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" target="cache" value="GET"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> target="replicas" value="lee"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="gw" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;" target="broker" value="comandos"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell div.div:
Redis cachea lecturas frecuentes. Read Replicas separan lectura/escritura.
Saga + DLQ manejan fallos.
Auto Scaling y Health Checks son transversales.
